title: Translation requested AyanamiRaisingProject strategy guide
wikitext:
[]: Translation requested (AyanamiRaisingProject strategy guide)             Quote Post by Crazy Packers Fan » Wed May 18, 2011 2:54 am I recently purchased a strategy guide to the game Ayanami Raising Project (which I still do not have). It's all in Japanese, naturally, so I can't understand any of it. I think some of you know some Japanese, so I was wondering if one of you could translate this short description of the Ayanami-with-a-whip ending. Thank you...

[]: Re: Translation requested (AyanamiRaisingProject strategy gu             Quote Post by symbv » Wed May 18, 2011 3:29 am Crazy Packers Fan wrote: I recently purchased a strategy guide to the game Ayanami Raising Project (which I still do not have). It's all in Japanese, naturally, so I can't understand any of it. I think some of you know some Japanese, so I was wondering if one of you could translate this short description of the Ayanami-with-a-whip ending. Thank you...

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed May 18, 2011 10:04 am I need to play that game again when I get a PS2 (I have the Rei with Asuka PS2 version). I got the endings of Rei being a kindergarten teacher as well as Asuka waking up Shinji in Episode 26. I heard that when Rei's a delinquent, she acts sort of Asuka-ish in her attitude with piloting and gets smug (as well as ignores that Lt's orders or runs off). I can't remember if Shinji can be a delinquent in his raising game but maybe not. That'd be funny if he could be. (His game actually takes place in-series like the Rei and Asuka game does. That raising project manga is one of those AUs.)

[]: Re: Translation requested (AyanamiRaisingProject strategy gu             Quote Post by Crazy Packers Fan » Wed May 18, 2011 3:56 pm symbv wrote: SM QUEEN Condition: Delinquency Index >150; Delinquency Days >50 Sense of Morality <100; Ph higher than Sensitivity If it comes to the point where "tsumiki kuzushi"* can even happen, she becomes the Queen of SM (Dominatrix). The minimum condition is 50 days of Delinquency Days. It can be achieved by spending the last few months in complete delinquency condition.

Article: Translation requested AyanamiRaisingProject strategy guide
 Delinquency Days >50 Sense of Morality <100; Ph higher than Sensitivity If it comes to the point where "tsumiki kuzushi"* can even happen, she becomes the Queen of SM (Dominatrix). The minimum condition is 50 days of Delinquency Days. It can be achieved by spending the last few months in complete delinquency condition.
